case_title: FALCON TRADING COMPANY VS FARMER'S PRODUCE MARKET

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $914.30 FILED BY FALCON TRADING COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT FARMER'S PRODUCE MARKET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FALCON TRADING COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FARMER'S PRODUCE MARKET $914.30 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $943.30 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FARMER'S PRODUCE MARKET
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $195.00 AS TO DEFENDANT FARMER'S PRODUCE MARKET
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FARMER'S PRODUCE MARKET
